dist/section58/devglow/fixture-project/apps/dashboard/home.mjs

Resolved from local-route-registry registry for /dashboard

Keyboard Commands

IDBindingDescription
devglow.openCtrl+Shift+GOpen DevGlow overlay for the active surface
devglow.copyPathCtrl+Shift+CCopy resolved backing file path
devglow.bugLogCtrl+Shift+BAppend the active path to the persistent bug log

IDCommand
proof.section58npm run workspace:proof:section58
